allow: Bash(node -e "const j=JSON.parse\(require\(''fs''\).readFileSync\(require\(''os''\).homedir\(\)+''/.claude/.credentials.json'',''utf8''\)\); const o=j.claudeAiOauth; if\(o\){console.log\(''Has refresh token:'', Boolean\(o.refreshToken\)\); console.log\(''Expires at:'', new Date\(o.expiresAt\).toISOString\(\)\); console.log\(''Expired:'', Date.now\(\) > o.expiresAt\)} else {console.log\(''No OAuth found''\)}")
Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\); const env=fs.readFileSync\(''C:/Projects/NewWebsite/.env'',''utf8''\); console.log\(''Has API key:'', env.includes\(''ANTHROPIC_API_KEY''\)\)")
